entries.quote: We see AI not merely as a productivity tool but as a foundational layer that can redefine travel discovery, planning, booking, servicing and loyalty.
entries.signal: MMT is repositioning itself as an AI-native travel platform — moving beyond OTA utility toward owning the full travel intent lifecycle; this directly threatens Scapia's ability to own the "travel planning" moment on its own app/card experience.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes AI-led platform lock-in (via Myra assistant + agentic commerce) will entrench MMT as the default travel interface — reducing card-driven discovery loops that fintechs like Scapia depend on.

entries.quote: Our priorities remain clear — driving an AI and proprietary data led transformation… to be the customer's first choice as one-stop shop for all travel needs, both for retail and corporate customers.
entries.signal: MMT is doubling down on the "one-stop shop" super-app moat, bundling fintech products (Book Now Pay Later, instant loans, forex) directly inside the platform — competing head-on with Scapia's travel-fintech value proposition on a vastly larger user base.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Leadership believes proprietary data + supply-side scale create a durable fintech-within-travel advantage that standalone travel credit cards cannot easily replicate.
